task.title: Normalize status text after clear actions

requirements.description: After clearing result, history, or summary, set statusText to a consistent "Ready to call helloLab.".
acceptance: Clear result sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
Clear history sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
Clear summary sets statusText to Ready to call helloLab.
constraints: Only modify the lab project under G:\codex测试
Do not change any production project files
